description: Public experimental mode ID assignments for gr-ident mode IDs 300-498.

assignments.name: Sleipnir
assignments.notes: Experimental GNU Radio digital voice mode for NFM channel spacing. Air interface: 8 parallel QPSK carriers, 900 baud per carrier (7200 sym/s total), 1300 Hz carrier spacing, ~1000-1200 Hz bandwidth per carrier with pulse shaping.
